subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Rafi'(?)
subcodes.first_line: Sanctified praise, through tongue and utterance, befitteth the Lord of all sovereignty, Who by the key of expression hath opened the doors [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد مقدس از لسان و بیان مالک الملکی را لایق و سزاست که بمفتاح بیان ابواب
subcodes.subjects: @call to action, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement
